subject: english

sections.heading: Passage (Part 1)
sections.content: The passage centres on transportation by rail. Transport by rail is best approached in a spirit of adventure and with an uncluttered schedule.

sections.heading: Passage (Part 2)
sections.content: This is because the Nigerian Railway Corporation is not renowned for getting there on time. The train is usually overcrowded and some passengers even travel on top of the carriages. Evaluation: Questions, page 141.

learning_objectives: Explain Passage in Comprehension: A Railway Journey
Answer comprehension questions based on Comprehension: A Railway Journey
Identify key ideas and details in Comprehension: A Railway Journey
